response: Chancellor Otto von Bismarck and the Reichstadt agreement were also part of the League of the Three Emperors, also known as the Dreikaiserbund. This alliance included the Kaiser of Germany, the Tsar of Russia, and the Kaiser of Austria-Hungary, and it was formed in 1873. The Reichstadt agreement was a specific agreement made between Austria-Hungary and Russia in July 1876, which was part of the broader context of the League of the Three Emperors.
